recommended_overlap_notes: Shared SP140 Crohn functional-genomics family with DS099. GSE161031 profiles Crohn PBMCs from SP140 SNP genotype groups under LPS/topotecan/etoposide perturbation. Public GEO sample titles expose five inferred donors by within-genotype numbering and ages, but these identifiers cannot be reconciled to GSE83381 donor/sample labels. Do not assign component_of_dataset_id; preserve countability as Unclear until donor-level overlap can be ruled in or out.

Shared SP140 Crohn functional-genomics family with DS095. GSE83381 includes Crohn PBMC genotype/LPS samples, healthy PBMC controls, and PBMC-derived macrophage SP140 knockdown samples. Public GEO labels use replicate/donor numbering but do not expose a crosswalk to GSE161031 donors. Do not assign component_of_dataset_id; preserve countability as Unclear until donor-level overlap can be reconciled.
